title: EQ - Custom EQ, save a custom EQ, change some values, Reset EQ
scenario: Custom EQ preset values are not cleared after pressing Reset EQ button in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Adjust some frequency sliders (e.g., Bass, Mid, Treble) to non-default positions.
Tap 'Save' and name the custom EQ preset (e.g., 'My Custom EQ').
Modify some slider values again (e.g., move Bass up, Treble down).
expected: All EQ frequency sliders return to their default (center/middle) positions. The previously saved custom EQ preset ('My Custom EQ') is removed from the saved presets list.
